name: n8n-proctor
description: Guardrailed validation control for agent-built n8n workflows

n8n_mcp_token.title: n8n MCP Access Token
n8n_mcp_token.description: MCP access token for n8n execution-backed validation (generated in n8n Settings → API)

n8n_api_key.title: n8n REST API Key
n8n_api_key.description: Optional REST API key — only needed when n8nac strips the availableInMCP flag on push
